content_pillar: Hell on Wheels
caption_text:
Heart-pounding action 🤝 hell-raising mischief 😈 Come check out Devil’s Reserve at Turn 12 during the NASCAR Chicago Street Race, featuring carnival games, prizes, and your chance to sip sweet, spicy, and tropical infused tequila! RECIPE
2oz Devil’s Reserve
1oz Watermelon Schnapps
0.25 Fresh Lime Juice
1 Dash of Hot Sauce (optional)
Top with Club Soda

METHOD
Add all ingredients, except the club soda to a shaker and fill with ice.
Shake and strain into glass filled with ice.
Top with club soda.
Garnish with watermelon cube.

#NASCARChicago

content_pillar: Hell on Wheels
caption_text:
Mix up our signature Spicy Soul Ties marg for a spicy twist to enjoy during tonight's @loveislandusa episode!

2 1/2 oz Devil’s Reserve™ 
1/2 oz Orange Liqueur
1 oz Fresh Lime Juice
1/4 oz Agave Nectar

Run a lime wedge along a margarita glass rim.
Dip the glass into a dish of chili-salt for the perfect spicy rim. Set aside.
Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain over fresh ice in your prepared glass.
Garnish with devilish limes.

🍹Watch Season 7 of #LoveIslandUSA every day except hump day – 9/8c only on @peacock
